title: Lesson 65: 'Nothing else', 'Another time', everybody, my, yours, his and more!
concepts: In this lesson we'll cover a multitude of those little phrases that add life to sentences and sometimes are the vital glue!

sentences.english: Didn't you see me last night?
I want to see them one more time (again)
I want to see them again
Did you go out to dance again?

sentences.spanish: Llegó tarde a mi casa otra vez
sentences.english: He arrived late to my house again

sentences.spanish: Llegó a mi casa otra vez queriendo hablar conmigo
sentences.english: He arrived at my house again wanting to speak with me

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora llegaron a tu casa?
sentences.english: At what time did they arrive at your house?

sentences.spanish: Todos llegaron a mi casa a la vez
sentences.english: Everybody arrived at my house at the same time

sentences.spanish: No encontré nada más en tu casa
sentences.english: I didn't find anything else in your house
We are with our friends (female group)
I am with my friends (mixed group)
I want to go to his house
I want to go to their house
I want to go to their houses
I want to go to his houses

sentences.spanish: Querio vivir en mi propia casa
sentences.english: I want to live in my own house

sentences.spanish: Lo vi con mis propios ojos
sentences.english: I saw it with my own eyes
